project.name: Straveda
project.goal: Build a production-grade website that matches the reference experience exactly in layout, motion, interaction quality, and premium feel, while applying the Straveda color palette precisely.

phases.title: Folder Structure and App Foundation
phases.goal: Build the complete Next.js project architecture first.
tasks: Create the exact app, components, lib, hooks, providers, data, public, and styles directories.
Set up app/layout.tsx, app/page.tsx, and the global route structure.
Add route groups for about, services, work, insights, and contact.
Add api/contact/route.ts for form submission.
Add loading.tsx, error.tsx, not-found.tsx, robots.txt, sitemap.ts, and manifest.ts.
phases.output: A fully structured Next.js architecture ready for implementation.

phases.title: Global Design System
phases.goal: Lock the brand system before any page work.
tasks: Apply the exact Straveda color palette everywhere.
Define reusable spacing, radius, shadow, and typography tokens.
Create shared button, badge, card, and section label components.
Define light and dark surface rules using white, orange, violet-blue, and black.
phases.output: Consistent brand tokens and reusable UI primitives.

phases.title: Premium Reference-Style Page Mapping
phases.goal: Map the website into premium sections that follow the reference pacing.
tasks: Home page: Navbar, Hero, Client Logos, Services Overview, Selected Work, Brand Psychology, Testimonials, CTA, Footer.
Services page: Hero, Service Pillars, Process Timeline, Benefits Grid, CTA.
Work page: Hero, Case Study Grid, Hover Previews, Results, CTA.
About page: Hero, Story, Values, Process, CTA.
Insights page: Hero, Articles Grid, Category Filters, Newsletter CTA.
Contact page: Hero, Form, FAQ, CTA.

phases.title: Complete Animation System
tasks: Add Lenis smooth scrolling globally.
Connect Lenis to GSAP ScrollTrigger.
Create word-by-word hero text reveals.
Create staggered section reveals on scroll.
Create image reveal masks and scale transitions.
Create parallax depth for key visuals.
Create page transitions with Framer Motion.
Create magnetic hover motion for premium buttons.
phases.output: A complete motion system matching the premium reference feel.

phases.title: Button Animation States
phases.goal: Define the exact interaction behavior for all CTAs.
tasks: Primary button base state: orange background, white text, pill radius.
Primary button hover: slight scale up, deeper orange, elevated shadow.
Primary button active: slight scale down with fast response.
Secondary button base: transparent or white surface with black or violet-blue border.
Secondary button hover: smooth fill or border transition without layout shift.
Link buttons: subtle underline, color shift, and motion easing.

phases.title: SEO and Performance Structure
phases.goal: Optimize for speed, crawlability, and discoverability.
tasks: Set global metadata and title templates.
Add unique metadata per page with generateMetadata().
Add JSON-LD for organization and services.
Keep exactly one H1 per page.
Use semantic sections and descriptive alt text.
Generate robots and sitemap automatically.
Use next/image, next/font, route-level code splitting, and lazy loading.
Prefer server components and limit client components to motion and interactive areas.

phases.title: Final Validation
phases.goal: Verify premium quality and remove deviation.
tasks: Check layout against the reference for spacing and hierarchy.
Verify every animation timing, easing, and sequence.
Check color accuracy against the palette screenshots.
Confirm responsive behavior on desktop, tablet, and mobile.
Confirm Core Web Vitals are optimized and interactions feel smooth.
phases.output: A production-ready Straveda website that is visually premium, fast, and motion-rich.

globalRules.tolerance: No visible mismatch in layout, timing, easing, sequence, or rhythm
globalRules.performanceRule: Use transform and opacity for all animated transitions wherever possible

behavior: Soft easing on wheel and trackpad input

buttons: Subtle magnetic pull effect on premium CTAs

staggerSystem.pattern: Sequential delay between children to create premium rhythm

metadata.defaultTitle: Straveda | Digital Marketing with Branding Psychology
metadata.defaultDescription: Straveda builds premium digital marketing experiences using branding psychology, motion systems, and conversion-focused design.

contentSEO: Case study pages with outcome-focused copy

rules: Use client components only when motion or interactivity is required
Split heavy animation logic into isolated components
Avoid blocking scripts on initial render

codingStandards: No inline magic values unless intentional

finalOutput.result: A fast, premium, SEO-ready, motion-rich Straveda Next.js website architecture
finalOutput.priority: Performance first, animation second, branding always
